title: crotalaria laburnoides var. laburnoides
intro: Crotalaria laburnoides var. laburnoides, also known as the laburnum pea or golden shower, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, including bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria laburnoides var. laburnoides can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
